title: asarum harperi
intro: Asarum harperi, also known as Harper's ginger or Harper's wild ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the birthwort family, Aristolochiaceae. The medicinal properties of Asarum harperi include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce nausea and vomiting, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Asarum harperi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
